title: Inventory snakebite and antivenom data
outcome: A dated source inventory separating burden estimates, facility data, and environmental risk layers.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.

title: Map sub-national snakebite risk
outcome: A sub-national snakebite risk map combining incidence data, agricultural population, and habitat proxies.
validation_method: Replicator validates risk map against available survey data and confirms proxy relationships.
done_condition: Risk map with validation against surveys and replication.

title: Map antivenom access gaps relative to snakebite risk
outcome: A gap map comparing snakebite risk to facility-level antivenom stocking and travel-time access.
validation_method: Replicator confirms gap methodology and validates stocking data against independent sources.
done_condition: Gap map includes facility-stocking and travel-time dimensions with replication.

title: Red-team misuse of antivenom access data
validation_method: Mitigations confirmed or publication blocked, then replicated.

title: Check whether outputs match snakebite program planning needs
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, misuse risk, replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases.
